facebook.caption: POV: you followed the smoke and ended up at Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. Grills firing on both sides of the street. Locals bargaining. Tourists looking lost. You? Right where you should be. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo after dark is the real Phu Quoc, not the resort lobby. 4.2 stars from 364 people who found it. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Smoke rising, grills packed, street lights on. This is Chợ đêm Phú Quốc at full speed. Walk the whole strip before you order. Trust the longest queue every time.
